LanguageData.Wula_Psi_Damage_Hediff.label: Psychic Chaos
LanguageData.Wula_Psi_Damage_Hediff.description: Temporary chaos caused by Wula Empire psychic strikes, which may lead to states like limb discoordination, resulting in loss of combat capability.
LanguageData.WULA_Darkmatter_Explosion.label: Dark Matter Burst
LanguageData.WULA_Darkmatter_Explosion.description: You are contaminated with unknown dark matter! It's about to explode! Good luck~
LanguageData.WULA_Psi_Regeneration.label: Psychic Regeneration
LanguageData.WULA_Psi_Regeneration.description: Under the influence of a powerful psychic ritual, this creature is regenerating at an astonishingly fast rate. They can heal almost any wound in a short time.
LanguageData.WULA_Psi_Regeneration.stages.0.label: Ritual Strength: Very Weak
LanguageData.WULA_Psi_Regeneration.stages.1.label: Ritual Strength: Weak
LanguageData.WULA_Psi_Regeneration.stages.2.label: Ritual Strength: Below Average
LanguageData.WULA_Psi_Regeneration.stages.3.label: Ritual Strength: Above Average
LanguageData.WULA_Psi_Regeneration.stages.4.label: Ritual Strength: Strong
LanguageData.WULA_Psi_Regeneration.stages.5.label: Ritual Strength: Very Strong
LanguageData.WULA_WeaponStealEffect.label: Magnetic Adhesion
LanguageData.WULA_WeaponStealEffect.description: Hit by a magnetic beam, which will seize the currently equipped weapon.
LanguageData.WULA_WeaponStealEffect.stages.0.label: Faint
LanguageData.WULA_WeaponStealEffect.stages.1.label: Below Average
LanguageData.WULA_WeaponStealEffect.stages.2.label: Above Average
LanguageData.WULA_WeaponStealEffect.stages.3.label: Extreme
